untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a ratio calculation (S&P 500 price / DJIA price) which is not available as a pre-computed indicator. The allowed indicators do not include cross-instrument ratios or synthetic calculations. Approximation shown assumes 'close' represents the ratio value, but this cannot be properly computed from the allowed indicator set without custom ratio data feed.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires computing a ratio between two different indices (S&P 500 / DJIA). The backtest engine would need either: (1) a pre-calculated ratio data feed, or (2) custom indicator support for cross-instrument calculations. The conditions above show the logic structure (deviation from 0.107 midpoint with boundaries at 0.104-0.110) but cannot be properly implemented with the current allowed indicators. Context-dependent direction reflects mean reversion logic: long when ratio is low (below midpoint), short when ratio is high (above midpoint).
